name: simpleux-design
description: SimpleUX Design skill helper dependencies for HTML verification and deck export.

scripts.logic:verify-examples: npm run logic:render-examples >/dev/null && for f in .tmp/logic-graphics/generated/*.html; do node scripts/verify_logic_graphics.mjs "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.logic:verify-bad-fixtures: for f in assets/logic-graphics/fixtures/bad-*.html; do if node scripts/verify_logic_graphics.mjs "$f" >/tmp/simpleux-logic-bad.out 2>&1; then cat /tmp/simpleux-logic-bad.out; exit 1; fi; done
